advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase before cross-department learning begins and next phase promotion is granted.

nutrition_support_routes: Enteral (NG, NJ, G, J, PEG, PEJ)

current_focus_areas: Beginning independent study across all assigned knowledge domains: enteral formula types, nutrition support routes, micronutrient deficiency assessment, protein requirements by condition, stress factors, metabolic calculations (Ireton-Jones, Penn State, Mifflin-St Jeor, Harris-Benedict), complete mineral list, complete vitamin list, detailed macro calculations, supplementation protocols, nutritional assessment tools, calorie calculations, micronutrient needs, macronutrient requirements, and 7 standalone clinical topics including TPN monitoring, refeeding syndrome, malnutrition identification, and nutrient-drug interactions. Building foundational expertise as Department Leader of the Clinical Nutrition & Metabolic Science department.
